channel.title: Apeiron
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Apeiron

item.title: Surveying the Types of Tables in Ancient Greek Texts
item.description: Article by Landon Hobbs DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/apeiron-2024-0006

item.title: Something New Under the Sun in Anaximenes’ Astronomy?
item.description: Article by Landon Hobbs DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/apeiron-2024-0045

item.title: Aristotle and the Stoics on the Notion of ἐνέργεια
item.description: Article by Landon Hobbs DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/apeiron-2024-0085

item.title: The Social Contract in Epicureanism
item.description: Article by Landon Hobbs DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/apeiron-2023-0088

item.title: The Stoic Theory of Case
item.description: Article by Landon Hobbs DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/apeiron-2023-0115

item.title: The Many Do Not Recollect: The Nature and Scope of Recollection in Plato’s Phaedrus
item.description: Article by Landon Hobbs DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/apeiron-2023-0102

item.title: Aristotle on Materiate Paronymy: Concerning an Apparent Inconsistency in Aristotle’s Metaphysics
item.description: Article by Landon Hobbs DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/apeiron-2024-0021
